---
title: "User Guide"
guide-section: "Getting Started"
---

Welcome to the **yaml12** User Guide. This guide covers practical usage of the `yaml12` package, a YAML 1.2 parser and formatter for Python built with Rust for speed and correctness.

- [YAML in 2 Minutes](yaml-in-2-minutes.qmd) — a quick introduction to YAML for Python users
- [Tags, Anchors, and Advanced YAML](tags-anchors-and-advanced-yaml.qmd) — custom tags, document streams, anchors, and more
- [Authors and Citation](authors-and-citation.qmd) — attribution and citation info
- [Contributing](contributing.qmd) — how to build the docs and contribute
